name: Sourdough Baguettes
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve yeast in warm water.
2. Add the rest of the ingredients. Mix and knead lightly.
3. Return to the bowl to rise until double.
4. Turn out onto a floured board and divide dough into two parts.
5. Shape each part into oblongs, then roll them up tightly, beginning with one side.
6. Seal the outside edge by pinching.
7. Shape into the desired size.
8. Place loaves on greased baking sheet and let rise until double again.
9. Make diagonal cuts on top of loaves with a razor blade or very sharp knife.
10. Brush lightly with water for a crisp crust.
11. Bake at 400 degrees F for about 25 minutes, or until brown and done.
This recipe makes 2 loaves, each yielding approximately 18 slices. Serving sizes are approximate and may vary based on personal preference.
